remarks: Priced To Sell! Unique 3 Level Single Family Home Offering Spacious Floor Plan and Incredible Potential. This Home Features Spacious Kitchen, Generously Sized Bedrooms, and Walk Out Basement Providing Flexible Space for Recreation, Storage, or Future Living Area. Enjoy the Convenience of Private Driveway, Rear Deck, and Fenced Backyard Perfect for Entertaining, Pets, Gardening, or Outdoor Activities. Property Needs Updating and Cosmetic Improvements but Presents Outstanding Opportunity for Homeowners or Investors Looking to Build Equity and Customize to Their Personal Style. Conveniently Located Near Shopping, Dining, Schools, Parks, and Major Commuter Routes. Don't Miss This Fantastic Opportunity! Sold As-Is. Sale dependent upon the contract owner's ability to take title.
